title: Tetrion Easy Spray Paint Mid Blue 400ml - Fast-Drying Aerosol for Wood, Metal, Ceramic & Plastic Surfaces
features: SUPERIOR COVERAGE: Achieve even and fast coverage with our acrylic spray paint, perfect for professionals and DIY enthusiasts alike.
QUICK DRYING: This spray paint dries rapidly, enabling quick projects without sacrificing quality, ideal for busy individuals and tight deadlines.
VIBRANT COLOURS Choose from a selection of vibrant colours that transform any surface with a stunning and eye-catching finish.
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for use on wood, metal, ceramic, and plastic, this paint meets a variety of renovation and creation needs.
EXCELLENT DURABILITY: Offers a durable finish that ensures long-lasting protection against wear and tear on multiple surfaces.
